title: Automatic quantification of tumor-stroma ratio as a prognostic biomarker for pancreatic cancer
authors: **Vendittelli P**, Bokhorst J-M, Smeets EMM, Kryklyva V, Brosens LAA, Verbeke C, Litjens G.
summary: Multi-class U-Net for TSR segmentation across 368 patients / 4 datasets (25 NL labs). Dice 0.75 (epithelium) and 0.86 (tumor bulk) on external TCGA-PAAD validation. TSR AUC 0.61 for 6-month survival prediction on an independent cohort.

title: Automatic quantification of TSR as a prognostic marker for pancreatic cancer
authors: **Vendittelli P**, Bokhorst J-M, Smeets EMM, Kryklyva V, Brosens LAA, Verbeke C, Litjens G.
summary: Segmentation of tumor epithelium, healthy epithelium, and TSR estimation from pancreatic whole-slide images.

title: Setting the research agenda for clinical AI in pancreatic adenocarcinoma imaging
authors: Schuurmans M, Alves N, **Vendittelli P**, Huisman H, Hermans J.
summary: Systematic review of the current role of AI for pancreatic cancer diagnosis and personalized treatment planning.

title: Automatic tumour segmentation in H&E-stained whole-slide images of the pancreas
summary: Multi-task U-Net with auxiliary classification head for coarse pancreatic tumour area segmentation; classification head reduced false positives.

title: End-to-end prognostication in pancreatic cancer by multimodal deep learning: a retrospective, multicenter study
authors: Schuurmans M, Saha A, Alves N, **Vendittelli P**, Yakar D, Sabroso-Lasa S, Xue N, Malats N, Huisman H, Hermans J, Litjens G.
summary: Multimodal deep learning combining CT imaging and clinical data for PDAC outcome prediction across multiple centers.

title: Artificial intelligence and radiologists in pancreatic cancer detection using standard of care CT scans (PANORAMA): an international, paired, non-inferiority, confirmatory, observational study
authors: Alves N, Schuurmans M, Rutkowski D, Saha A, **Vendittelli P**, et al. (PANORAMA consortium).
summary: International paired non-inferiority study comparing AI and radiologists for pancreatic cancer detection on standard-of-care CT.

title: Navigating the landscape of multimodal AI in medicine: a scoping review on technical challenges and clinical applications
authors: Schouten D, Nicoletti G, Dille B, Chia C, **Vendittelli P**, Schuurmans M, Litjens G, Khalili N.
summary: Scoping review on technical challenges and clinical applications of multimodal AI in medicine.

title: Combining AI-based Biomarkers for PDAC Survival
authors: Hensens L, Sabroso-Lasa S, Verbeke C, Malats N, Litjens G, **Vendittelli P**.
summary: Multi-tissue segmentation pipeline integrating TSR, mitosis density, stromal cell density and tumor-to-tissue ratio for multivariate survival prediction in pancreatic cancer.
